Common.phoneOrEmailRequired: Provide at least a phone or email
Common.atLeastOnePaymentRequired: Register at least one payment method

Calendar.closeDayDialogBody: Mark {count} confirmed booking(s) on {date} as completed? This cannot be undone.
Calendar.closeDayError: Failed to close day. Please try again.
Calendar.closeDayNoConfirmed: No confirmed bookings to close on this day.
Calendar.closeDayFuture: You can't close a day that hasn't happened yet.

DailyTotals.title: Daily totals
DailyTotals.noTips: No tips recorded for this day.

BookingForm.noCompanions: No companions — same client info and start time, no extra data needed.
BookingForm.tooltipInfo: Always create one single booking per person. For couples or groups, feel free to use the Companions section below.
BookingForm.therapistRequestedHelper: Record in notes how strictly the client wants this therapist.
BookingForm.walkInHint: Use only when you genuinely can't capture the client's name and contact.
BookingForm.walkInWarning: This booking will be saved with no client details. You won't be able to contact this client afterwards — to confirm, reschedule, or follow up. Use this only when the client's details are genuinely unavailable.
BookingForm.confirmRemoveFromGroup: Remove this booking from the group? Other group members will keep their grouping, unless it is the last one left in the group.
BookingForm.removeFromGroupError: Failed to remove booking from group
BookingForm.sameClientAsPrimaryHelper: No separate client record will be created for this companion

ManagePayments.title: Manage Payments
ManagePayments.confirmRemoveText: Remove this voucher redemption? The balance will be restored.
ManagePayments.confirmRemoveEventText: Remove this charge? The booking total will be updated.

BookingDelete.messageWithoutName: Are you sure you want to delete this booking? This action cannot be undone.

Tips.noTips: No tips recorded for this booking.

Clients.deleteWithName: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
Clients.deleteWithoutName: Are you sure you want to delete this client? This action cannot be undone.

Services.deleteWithoutName: Are you sure you want to delete this service? This action cannot be undone.

Therapists.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

Vouchers.noContactConfirmMessage: This voucher has no phone or email saved at all — neither for the buyer nor the recipient. Keeping at least one contact is recommended so the voucher can be traced later. Do you want to create it anyway?
Vouchers.deleteUseMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher use of {amount}? The balance will be restored.
Vouchers.deleteVoucherMessage: Are you sure you want to delete voucher {code}? This cannot be undone.
Vouchers.cannotDeleteWithBalance: Refund the remaining balance to 0 € before deleting this voucher.
Vouchers.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number

Stats.tooltipRevenue: Cash and card charged for bookings (by appointment date) plus voucher sales (by voucher creation date), minus refunds.
Stats.tooltipBookings: Bookings counted up to today: completed, pending and confirmed. Cancelled bookings are not included.
Stats.tooltipAvgPrice: Average price of completed bookings in the period. P25 and P75 mark the lower and upper price range.
Stats.tooltipRevenuePerHour: Total revenue divided by the booked hours of completed bookings in the period.
Stats.tooltipUniqueClients: Distinct clients with at least one booking in the period, both new and returning.
Stats.tooltipRetention: Share of this period's clients who had already booked before — returning clients, not first-timers.
Stats.noHoursData: No completed bookings for this month.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.section0tip0: Click "New Booking" in the top-right corner.
calendar.section0tip1: Fill in the client details — name, phone, and email are optional but useful.
calendar.section0tip2: Select the service, therapist, date & time, duration, and price.
calendar.section0tip3: Click Save to confirm. The booking appears on the calendar immediately.
calendar.section1tip0: Click any event block on the calendar to open it.
calendar.section1tip1: Update any field and click Save Changes.
calendar.section1tip2: You can also change the status (e.g. mark as Completed or Cancelled).
calendar.section2tip0: Use the ← → arrows to move to the previous or next day/week/month.
calendar.section2tip1: Click "Today" to jump back to the current date.
calendar.section2tip2: Switch between "By therapist", "Day", "Week", and "Month" views using the buttons top-right.
calendar.section2tip3: "By therapist" shows all therapists as side-by-side columns — useful to spot free slots.
calendar.section3tip0: Phone numbers default to Spanish format (e.g. 666123456). For international numbers, type the country code with a + prefix (e.g. +44 7700 900123).
calendar.section3tip1: Emails must follow the standard format (e.g. name@example.com).
calendar.section4tip0: Pending (transitional): the client is interested but hasn't confirmed yet. Use it to hold their details and desired time so you don't lose them.
calendar.section4tip1: Confirmed (transitional): the client has confirmed they are coming. Use this once the appointment is set and you are expecting them.
calendar.section4tip2: Completed (final): the session is done and the client has left. Switch to this once the appointment has finished.
calendar.section4tip3: Cancelled (final): the client didn't show up or cancelled. Use this for no-shows and cancellations. No payments can be added to a cancelled booking. Always leave a note in cancelled bookings explaining the reason for the cancellation.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.section0tip0: Type a client name or phone number in the search bar to filter instantly.
bookings.section0tip1: Click any column header to sort ascending or descending.
bookings.section0tip2: Use the pagination arrows at the bottom to browse older bookings.
bookings.section1tip0: Click the pencil icon on any row to open the edit dialog.
bookings.section1tip1: You can change the service, therapist, date/time, price, and status.
bookings.section1tip2: To cancel a booking, change the Status field to "Cancelled" and save.
bookings.section2tip0: The Paid column shows the total amount already collected.
bookings.section2tip1: Open a booking and click "Add Payment" to record a new payment.
bookings.section2tip2: You can split payments between cash, card, and voucher.
bookings.section3tip0: Open a booking, scroll to the Tips section, and click "Add".
bookings.section3tip1: Select the therapist, amount, and payment method.
bookings.section3tip2: IVA is applied automatically for credit card and voucher tips.
bookings.section4tip0: Phone numbers default to Spanish format (e.g. 666123456). For international numbers, type the country code with a + prefix (e.g. +44 7700 900123).
bookings.section4tip1: Emails must follow the standard format (e.g. name@example.com).
bookings.section5tip0: Pending (transitional): the client is interested but hasn't confirmed yet. Use it to hold their details and desired time so you don't lose them.
bookings.section5tip1: Confirmed (transitional): the client has confirmed they are coming. Use this once the appointment is set and you are expecting them.
bookings.section5tip2: Completed (final): the session is done and the client has left. Switch to this once the appointment has finished.
bookings.section5tip3: Cancelled (final): the client didn't show up or cancelled. Use this for no-shows and cancellations. No payments can be added to a cancelled booking.

clients.title: Clients
clients.section0tip0: Click a client row to see their full profile and booking history.
clients.section0tip1: The booking count shows how many times they have visited.
clients.section1tip0: Click "New Client" in the top-right corner.
clients.section1tip1: Name and phone are the most important fields — email is optional.
clients.section2tip0: Use the search bar to filter by name, phone, or email.
clients.section3tip0: Phone numbers default to Spanish format (e.g. 666123456). For international numbers, type the country code with a + prefix (e.g. +44 7700 900123).
clients.section3tip1: Emails must follow the standard format (e.g. name@example.com).

payments.title: Payments
payments.section0tip0: Each row is a payment event — one booking can have several rows if paid in parts.
payments.section0tip1: The Method column shows how the client paid: cash, card, or voucher.
payments.section1tip0: Payments are recorded inside the booking — open the booking from Calendar or Bookings and click Add Payment.
payments.section1tip1: You cannot add a payment directly from this page.

services.title: Services
services.section0tip0: Services define what treatments you offer and their standard durations and prices.
services.section0tip1: When creating a booking, selecting a service + duration will auto-fill the price.
services.section1tip0: Click "New Service" and enter a name and short name.
services.section1tip1: Add one or more duration/price combinations (e.g. 60 min → €65, 90 min → €80).
services.section2tip0: Click the pencil icon on a service row to update its name or prices.
services.section2tip1: Changes apply to new bookings only — existing bookings keep their original price.

therapists.title: Therapists
therapists.section0tip0: Click "New Therapist" to add a team member.
therapists.section0tip1: Each therapist needs a full name — phone, email, and notes are optional.
therapists.section0tip2: Therapists appear in the booking form and in the By-therapist calendar view.
therapists.section1tip0: Deleting a therapist removes them from future booking dropdowns.
therapists.section1tip1: Their past bookings are not affected.
therapists.section2tip0: Phone numbers default to Spanish format (e.g. 666123456). For international numbers, type the country code with a + prefix (e.g. +44 7700 900123).
therapists.section2tip1: Emails must follow the standard format (e.g. name@example.com).

vouchers.title: Vouchers
vouchers.section0tip0: Click "New Voucher" and set the initial balance and expiry date.
vouchers.section0tip1: A unique code is generated automatically.
vouchers.section1heading: Applying a voucher to a booking
vouchers.section1tip0: Open the booking, click Add Payment, and select Voucher as the payment method.
vouchers.section1tip1: Enter the voucher code — the balance is deducted automatically.
vouchers.section2tip0: Search by the voucher code or client name to find it in the table.
vouchers.section2tip1: The Balance column shows the remaining credit.
vouchers.section3tip0: Phone numbers default to Spanish format (e.g. 666123456). For international numbers, type the country code with a + prefix (e.g. +44 7700 900123).
vouchers.section3tip1: Emails must follow the standard format (e.g. name@example.com).

stats.title: Stats
stats.section0tip0: Use the preset buttons (This week, This month, etc.) to switch quickly.
stats.section0tip1: Select "Custom" to enter any start and end date.
stats.section1tip0: The six cards at the top are the key business numbers for the selected period.
stats.section1tip1: Scroll down for detailed charts: revenue by payment method, bookings by service and hour, client retention, and tips.
stats.section1tip2: Charts update automatically when you change the date range.

tips.title: Tips
tips.section0tip0: This page lists tips that have been recorded but not yet paid out to therapists.
tips.section0tip1: Tips are grouped by therapist and month.
tips.section1tip0: Click "Release" next to a therapist's pending tips to mark them as paid.
tips.section1tip1: The net amount (after IVA) is what the therapist receives.
tips.section1tip2: Once released, the tips move out of the pending list.
tips.section2tip0: Tips are added inside a booking — open the booking and scroll to the Tips section.

fallback.title: Help
fallback.section0tip0: Use the sidebar to navigate between pages.
fallback.section0tip1: Click "New Booking" from the Calendar or Bookings page to create a booking.
fallback.section0tip2: Each page has its own help — navigate there and re-open this panel.

Guidelines.emptyAdmin: No guidelines yet. Create one to share guidance with your team.
Guidelines.confirmDelete: Delete guideline "{label}"? This cannot be undone.
